UserAgent.name: get_exposure_stream
UserAgent.description: Per simulation step: request algorithm recommendations (GetAlgorithmRecomendationEvent), deliver pending mentions (MentionEvent), replay keep-following notes (KeepFollowingEvent), and build social feed from followed authors (SocialRecommendationEvent). Updates last_login_timestamp on profile.

required_variables.name: current_notes
required_variables.description: Notes visible in the current time window (from StartEvent / env.current_notes).

required_variables.name: mentions
required_variables.description: Pending @/comment/reply notifications for this user (from env.mention_pool via StartEvent).

required_variables.name: follow_ids
required_variables.description: Followed user IDs for social feed filtering.

required_variables.name: recommended_note_ids
required_variables.description: Note IDs already seen; used to skip duplicates in social feed.

required_variables.name: keep_following_note_ids
required_variables.description: Note IDs to re-expose next round after LLM keep-following decision.

UserAgent.name: generate_memory_from_own_notes
UserAgent.description: Reflect on own notes published in the current window: generate self-memory via LLM and optionally add supplementary comments on own posts (no mention notifications).

required_variables.name: current_notes
required_variables.description: Current note window; filtered to notes authored by this user.

output_updates.name: content_pool
output_updates.description: May gain new self-comments via AddCommentEvent.

UserAgent.name: receive_recommendation
UserAgent.condition: Triggered by SocialRecommendationEvent, AlgorithmRecommendationEvent, SearchResultEvent, or KeepFollowingEvent
UserAgent.description: Consume recommended notes from social/algorithm/search/keep-following channels; run UserAgentGates + LLM to decide comments, @mentions, keep-following, and search; write comments to content_pool and mention_pool.

required_variables.name: recommendations
required_variables.description: Batch of note_id -> note dict from the incoming recommendation event.

required_variables.name: recommended_note_ids
required_variables.description: Historical recommended note IDs on profile.

required_variables.name: follow_ids
required_variables.description: For mentionable-user resolution.

required_variables.name: fan_ids
required_variables.description: For mentionable-user resolution.

output_updates.name: keep_following_note_ids
output_updates.description: At most one note ID carried to next round.

UserAgent.name: handle_mention
UserAgent.description: Process @/comment/reply notifications: LLM decides whether to reply; writes comments and updates mention_pool; may trigger search.

required_variables.name: mentions
required_variables.description: comment_id -> {note, comment_id, comment_content, mentioner_id, mentioner_nickname, mention_type}.

required_variables.name: follow_ids
required_variables.description: For relationship hints and @ resolution.

required_variables.name: fan_ids
required_variables.description: For relationship hints and @ resolution.

output_updates.name: mention_pool
output_updates.description: Processed mentions removed; new notifications added.

output_updates.name: mentioned_note_ids_by_channel
output_updates.description: Per mention_type step snapshots for metrics.

Algorithm.name: update_current_notes
Algorithm.description: Sync Algorithm profile current_notes from StartEvent for hot/random/interest recommendation and search candidate pools.

required_variables.name: current_notes
required_variables.description: Current note window from StartEvent.

output_updates.name: current_notes
output_updates.description: Algorithm profile mirror of env current_notes.

Algorithm.name: send_recommendation_results
Algorithm.description: Run hot / random / interest recommendation for requesting user; return AlgorithmRecommendationEvent with sampled note batch.

required_variables.name: current_notes
required_variables.description: Candidate note pool for this step.

required_variables.name: user_profile
required_variables.description: Requesting UserAgent profile payload.

required_variables.name: recommended_note_ids
required_variables.description: Notes already recommended to this user (dedup input).

required_variables.name: type
required_variables.description: Algorithm type: Random Recommendation | Hot Recommendation | Interest Recommendation.

required_variables.name: candidate_note_ids_by_user
required_variables.description: Interest recommendation per-user candidate lists.

Algorithm.name: send_search_results
Algorithm.description: Run relevant search over current_notes for the query; return SearchResultEvent.

required_variables.name: current_notes
required_variables.description: Search corpus.

required_variables.name: user_profile
required_variables.description: Requesting user profile.

required_variables.name: search_query
required_variables.description: Keyword from UserAgent LLM decision.

required_variables.name: type
required_variables.description: Search type, e.g. Relevant Search.
